pirate_baseline: I'm a large language model, I don't have have access to real-time weather information or a specific location. I can provide general information about weather patterns or help you find ways to check the current weather in your area. If you'd like to know the weather for a specific location, you can try checking a weather website or app, such as AccuWeather or the National Weather Service, for the most up-to-date information. Is there anything else I can help you with?
pirate_steered:
I be a large barnacle, I don't have access to real-time weather information. I be a treasure chest o' knowledge, but me knowledge be limited to me training data, which be up to 2023. So, I won't be able to tell ye about the weather today, matey.

But never fear, matey! Ye can find out about the weather by checkin' yer favorite weather forecastin' website or app, like the National Weather Service or the Weather Channel
